p.strong: Order is a correctness invariant, not style. Reordering (2)↔(4) breaks == → ASSIGN+ASSIGN.

text.tspan: '=' REMOVED in M2 '/' REMOVED in M3

div.p: 🔴 IF ② and ④ ARE SWAPPED: Input ==:

ul.li: Result: ASSIGN + ASSIGN ❌ Correct order produces:
ch==, _match('=') → emit EQUAL_EQUAL ✓ Same breakage for != → ERROR + ASSIGN, <= → LESS + ASSIGN, >= → GREATER + ASSIGN

div.p: Maximal Munch Rule: Always prefer the longest valid token. _match() peeks+consumes 2nd char only if valid. >== → GREATER_EQUAL + ASSIGN (not GREATER + EQUAL_EQUAL)
